refQuery.displaySQL: (Fire Discovery Date Time is in the last 1 (Amount) Day (Unit))

config.text:
Low Flow

This indicator shows a quick numerical representation of flood gauges that are currently at Low Flow.

No Flooding

This indicator shows a quick numerical representation of flood gauges that are currently at "No Flooding" which is a positive, normal operating status.
